outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Iran foreign minister presses on with regional tour despite Trump canceling envoys' visit
outlets.summary: Live updates. Araghchi meets Putin in Moscow. Trump on Fox: 'they can call us.' IDF soldier Fooks killed by Hezbollah drone. 14 killed in Lebanon strikes. Israel evacuates 7 towns beyond buffer zone. Oil spikes to $107.97.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: With goals of Iran war unfulfilled, Netanyahu's government faces unhappy public as elections loom
outlets.summary: Netanyahu faces Israeli electorate with war goals unfulfilled. Polls show ruling coalition dropping to 49-51 Knesset seats. War costly and open-ended. Hezbollah 'dismantling' ceasefire rhetoric under domestic pressure.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: White House rejects latest Iranian offer as Pakistan peace talks fail
outlets.summary: Trump on Fox Sunday Briefing: 'they can call us.' Israel strikes kill 14 in Lebanon, soldier killed by Hezbollah drone. Oil spikes on stalled talks. Blockade going global. War Powers deadline approaching.

outlets.name: Washington Examiner
outlets.headline: America's 'growing' blockade of Iran is 'going global'
outlets.summary: Hegseth Pentagon briefing: 'No one sails from the Strait of Hormuz to anywhere in the world without the permission of the United States Navy.' 37 ships redirected. Blockade expanding.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Israel issues forced evacuation orders for southern Lebanon in escalation
outlets.summary: Israel evacuates 7 towns beyond buffer zone after IDF soldier killed by Hezbollah drone. 14 killed, 37 wounded across southern Lebanon. Netanyahu: 'Hezbollah dismantling ceasefire.' Araghchi meets Putin.

outlets.name: Bloomberg
outlets.headline: Iran War: Hormuz Double Blockade Halts Ship Traffic, Dims Hope for the Economy
outlets.summary: Analysis of dual blockade: both US and Iran controlling strait entry/exit points. 2,800 ships stranded. Mine-clearing could take 6 months. Shipowners say return to normal is months away.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IDF soldier killed in south Lebanon drone attack as Israel, Hezbollah trade fire and blame
outlets.summary: Sgt. Idan Fooks (19) killed by Hezbollah drone in Taybeh — 3rd soldier KIA during ceasefire. 6 wounded. Netanyahu: 'Hezbollah dismantling ceasefire.' Israel evacuates 7 towns. 14 killed in IDF strikes. Home Front Command restricts northern gatherings.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Israel 'prepared to renew' war against Iran — Defense Minister Katz
outlets.summary: Katz says Israel awaiting US 'green light' to 'return Iran to the age of darkness.' Targets marked. IDF prepared for both defense and attack.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran's foreign minister will meet President Putin in Moscow
outlets.summary: Araghchi met Putin, Lavrov at Kremlin — briefed on ceasefire and Iran's red lines. Hezbollah denounces Israeli ceasefire violations (500+). Iran frames blockade as the obstacle to peace. Pezeshkian rejects 'forced negotiations.'

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran not to enter talks under pressure, threats, blockade: Pres. Pezeshkian
outlets.summary: Pezeshkian told PM Sharif Iran rejects 'forced negotiations' under blockade. Demands US remove 'operational obstacles' first. Iran framing: Washington the obstacle, not Tehran.
